subjects.description: towering waterfall fed by a clear swift river
subjects.appearance_details: wide sheets of white water, glassy edges breaking into spray, mist plumes rising from the plunge basin
subjects.relationship: main natural force connecting the river above with the basin below
subjects.location: center frame descending from upper cliff to lower basin
subjects.relative_size: large, filling most of the vertical frame
subjects.orientation: falling straight downward over a rocky ledge
subjects.action: plunges rapidly into the basin, throwing mist and droplets outward
subjects.state_changes: spray thickens and rainbow colors flicker as sunlight catches the mist
subjects.skin_tone_and_texture: clear water turning white and foamy over dark wet rock

subjects.appearance_details: deep blue green pool with foam rings, rippling reflections of trees, small rainbow shimmer in airborne mist
subjects.relationship: receives the falling water and reflects the surrounding forest
subjects.location: lower center and foreground below the waterfall
subjects.relative_size: medium broad pool at the base of the falls
subjects.orientation: horizontal water surface spreading outward from impact point
subjects.pose: churning near the impact and calmer near the edges
subjects.action: swirls, foams, and sends ripples toward the viewer
subjects.state_changes: surface patterns constantly reshape under the falling water
subjects.skin_tone_and_texture: clear blue green water with white foam and glossy reflections

subjects.appearance_details: dense green trees, mossy rocks, wet leaves, filtered sunlight, small branches moving in spray filled air
subjects.relationship: natural enclosure framing the waterfall and basin
subjects.location: both sides of the falls and background cliff edges
subjects.relative_size: large environmental frame around the water
subjects.orientation: trees rise vertically around the rocky gorge
subjects.pose: rooted along the cliff and basin edges
subjects.action: leaves tremble lightly from mist and breeze
subjects.state_changes: wet foliage glistens as sunlight shifts through the spray
subjects.skin_tone_and_texture: green leaves, moss, dark bark, slick stone

background_setting: towering waterfall in a green forest gorge, clear river above, misty plunge basin below, wet rocks and verdant trees surrounding the scene

lighting.conditions: soft daylight with sunbeams cutting through mist, bright highlights on falling water, small rainbow shimmer above the basin
lighting.direction: scene-appropriate key light from the most visible practical or natural source
lighting.shadows: soft scene-consistent shadows that ground subjects and objects
lighting.illumination_effect: soft daylight with sunbeams cutting through mist, bright highlights on falling water, small rainbow shimmer above the basin

aesthetics.composition: fresh, powerful, serene, immersive, natural spectacle
aesthetics.color_scheme: colors follow the source prompt and scene materials
aesthetics.mood_atmosphere: fresh, powerful, serene, immersive, natural spectacle

cinematography.camera_motion: slow push in from a wide forest view to the waterfall and basin, stable camera with fine mist crossing the lens
cinematography.focus: main subject and key action remain sharp

style_medium: photorealistic text to video nature scene
artistic_style: cinematic nature documentary realism with crisp water detail and soft mist
context: a clear river drops over a high cliff into a forest basin, filling the air with spray and rainbow light

actions.description: the shot opens on the full waterfall pouring into the basin amid lush trees
the camera pushes closer as sheets of water break into mist and foam spreads across the pool
sunlight catches the spray, creating a faint rainbow while ripples radiate across the basin

temporal_caption: A clear river plunges over a tall waterfall into a misty forest basin where sunlight forms a faint rainbow.
